questions.question: 1000 одновременных sensors с timeout=4h, poke_interval=60s. Какие DB ops/час для mode='reschedule'?

options.text: 60,000 inserts/hour в task_reschedule (1000 sensors × 60 poke attempts/hour). DB write IOPS bottleneck, требуется powerful instance (db.r6g.xlarge+). Scheduler tick latency растёт значительно

questions.explanation: reschedule mode: каждый failed poke → AirflowRescheduleException → INSERT INTO task_reschedule. 1000 sensors × (3600/60) = 60k inserts/hour. Plus UPDATE on task_instance state changes. Это серьёзная DB write нагрузка: requires db.r6g.xlarge minimum, hurts scheduler performance (он scans task_reschedule на каждом tick), affects parallel dataset cascade processing. Mitigation: poke_interval >= 5 минут, или migrate to deferrable. Deferrable: 0 ops/hour для same workload — 1000 rows в trigger table once, async polls в triggerer без DB writes.

questions.question: Когда deferrable mandatory в production?

options.text: Hard rules: timeout > 1 hour, OR > 100 concurrent sensors, OR external API polling под rate limits, OR real-time event waits. Without deferrable — worker pool unmanageable

questions.explanation: Production rules: (1) timeout > 1h — poke блокирует slot часами, reschedule переливает DB; (2) >100 concurrent — worker pool требует 100+ slots только для waits; (3) External APIs — async polling more efficient at scale; (4) Real-time events — async pattern natively fits. Не 'всегда' — для quick (<60s) waits в маленьких DAGs deferrable overhead больше чем benefit. Deferrable не experimental — AIP-40 stable с 2.5, production-ready 2.7+, default option в 2.10+.

questions.question: Latency three modes от event до task ready-to-continue (event happens at T=0):

options.text: poke ~0.5×poke_interval (next poke catches), reschedule ~poke_interval + 15-30s (scheduler tick + worker startup), deferrable ~5-15s after event (trigger emit + scheduler + worker)

questions.explanation: Latency profile: (1) poke — tight loop on worker thread; если event at T=30, next poke at T=60, detection T=60. Avg latency = poke_interval/2. (2) reschedule — after rejected poke, TI=up_for_reschedule; scheduler tick (5s) + queueing + worker startup (5-20s K8s) = poke_interval + 15-30s additional. (3) deferrable — async polling at trigger.run() poke interval (could be faster); when condition met, yield event → triggerer emit (1s) → scheduler picks scheduled TI (5s) → worker startup (5-15s). Sweet spot: deferrable отлично работает с reasonable 5-15s latency post-event.

questions.question: Migration с poke на deferrable обычно сводится к добавлению deferrable=True parameter в существующих sensors + deploy triggerer process. Логика DAG менять не нужно.
questions.explanation: Modern Airflow (2.7+): built-in sensors имеют deferrable=True flag, который переключает execute() implementation на defer/execute_complete pattern. Никаких изменений в DAG body — same operator class, same kwargs (bucket_key, poke_interval, timeout), просто add deferrable=True. Plus deploy triggerer (helm replicas: 2). Custom triggers не нужны для standard cases. Это minimal-effort migration с huge production wins. Caveat: triggerer должен быть deployed ДО включения deferrable=True (иначе зомби tasks в state=deferred). Order matters.
